title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue is visible on the Home Screen
scenario: Location permission dialog appears on Poly Lens app Home Screen after first-time onboarding as Guest or Login
steps: Launch the Poly Lens app for the first time.
Accept the license agreement and privacy policy.
expected: The user lands on the Home Screen and is prompted with a location sharing dialogue displaying the headline "Allow 'Poly Lens' to use your location?" with options 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', and 'Don't Allow'. The following text is visible: "Poly Lens uses your location to find your device. See the Poly Privacy Policy in General Settings for more information."
